mechanism_narrative: A persistently low and stable FEDFUNDS rate near current levels reduces the equity discount rate and supports risk asset valuations, producing a modest positive drift in S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days regardless of other conditions.
failure_condition: Rank IC between FEDFUNDS level and forward 20d SPX returns falls below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or returns show no significant positive drift (t-test p > 0.05) when FEDFUNDS is below its 5-year median.

mechanism_narrative: When UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month window from a cyclical low, markets price in an approaching labor-market inflection that historically precedes recessionary equity drawdowns, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: In more than 50% of historical instances where UNRATE rose > 0.3pp in 3 months, forward 60-day SPX returns are positive, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL year-over-year inflation accelerates while FEDFUNDS remains low relative to inflation (implying negative real rates), equity markets anticipate future policy tightening risk, producing negative forward returns; this effect only materializes through the joint configuration of both series, not either alone.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 12m change > 3% while FEDFUNDS remains below CPI 12m change
regime_hint: negative real rate regime with rising inflation
failure_condition: SPX 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of triggered instances, or interaction term's marginal Rank IC contribution over single-series baselines is < 0.01 across rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in HOUST signals weakening housing demand and future construction employment contraction, which depresses consumer wealth effects and equity risk appetite; this negative relationship is amplified during monetary tightening regimes where housing is more rate-sensitive, but is muted or reversed during easing regimes.
failure_condition: The negative correlation between HOUST declines and forward 60d SPX returns fails to strengthen (or reverses) during tightening regimes relative to easing regimes, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window during tightening periods.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month acceleration in PAYEMS above trend signals robust labor demand and near-term consumer spending capacity, generating a short-lived positive S&P 500 return impulse over the following week as markets reprice earnings expectations upward.
failure_condition: Rank IC between PAYEMS monthly change surprise and forward 5-day SPX return is below 0.02 over any rolling 2-year window, or the sign of the effect flips in more than 40% of quarters.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in INDPRO above its trailing 6-month trend reflects expanding industrial output and corporate profitability, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the following month as earnings revisions turn favorable.
failure_condition: Rank IC between INDPRO trend deviation and forward 20d SPX returns is below 0.03 over any rolling 2-year window, or effect direction flips during expansion vs contraction phases without regime adjustment.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp month-over-month surge in RSAFS above a 2% threshold indicates unexpectedly strong consumer demand that triggers immediate positive repricing of consumer discretionary and broad equity indices within the following week, driven by short-term momentum trading rather than fundamental reassessment.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day SPX returns following RSAFS surges > 2% are not significantly different from unconditional baseline returns (t-test p > 0.05), or occur less than 55% of the time in the predicted direction.

mechanism_narrative: The joint occurrence of rising INDPRO and falling UNRATE signals a self-reinforcing expansionary phase where industrial capacity utilization and labor absorption move together, producing a durable positive S&P 500 return over the following quarter; neither series alone captures this reinforcing dynamic since INDPRO gains without labor absorption can reflect automation-driven output with weaker consumption follow-through.
failure_condition: The joint INDPRO-up/UNRATE-down signal's Rank IC for forward 60d returns is not meaningfully higher than either single-series signal's Rank IC over any 3-year rolling window, or the interaction underperforms the additive combination of single-series effects.
